reviews.review_msg: First, the lectures are very interactive. Makes you feel like you're in a book-club. Loved the texts chosen for this course and even ENG114. Tough grader but makes you stay motivated all through the lectures. Very helpful and knowledgeable. Highly recommend for any literature courses.
It was really a pleasure to take his class. He will give detailed feedback to each person in a sincere and friendly manner.

He is a great person, he's passionate and friendly, his class is easy if you are open-minded enough. Essay grading could be confusing, I understand what he wants to see in the essay but I need time practicing my writing. Still wonder why he looks familiar, maybe Robert Downey Jr has a side job when he doesn't grow his beard (jk).

Teddy is one of the 7 wonders of the world. His teaching and passion are amazing and he is quite the down to earth person. Be invested in the class and you will enjoy it. I can't say enough good things about him just take the class and enjoy the ride of teaching and enlightenment. Fantastic professor and probably my favourite instructor of all-time

Dr. Wisniwski is easily the BEST English professor I have ever had. His passion for literature is incredibly contagious. He picked the most AMAZING stories and made them so relevant to our lives. He went above and beyond his call of duty to make sure assignments were clear (even writing us a sample essay!) This class was so worthwhile and helpful.
Although he has interesting things to say and the readings were fun. He is not clear on assignments and wants to see his own opinion repeated in the stidents works.

very interesting person with lots to share. Passionate about the topics and books. Doesn't really show that he cares about the students but he is actually really willing to help. Lectures are structured interesting and interactively. His lectures are 10/10. However, can be a tough marker.

Teds class was a very nice break from the chaos that was my last semester. His lectures are unique (at least in FIC), and listening to him is pure pleasure. Every week he hands out questions which can help you prepare for the exams and goes through them in detail. My advice is to actively participate, and you should be fine. Thank you, Ted!
One of the íntructors that I really admire so far. Very passionate about teaching, very inspirational lectures. Work hard and youll get the mark you deserve. Highly recommended!

He's super intense and passionate. One of my absolute favorite professors ever. If you put decent effort into reading the material and doing the work, it's not hard to get top marks. However, it is much more difficult to do well in exam settings or final project. Overall though, he's awesome. 10/10 would recommend.
